title: The Swirls Cookbook
description: Copy-paste recipes for real workflows. Each .swirls file is a complete, runnable graph you can drop into your project, tweak to taste, and deploy.

categories.title: Sales & Marketing
categories.description: Recipes for lead management, competitive analysis, content planning, and outbound communications.

recipes.title: Lead Scoring
recipes.description: Scores incoming leads, persists results, and alerts sales on hot ones.

recipes.title: Competitive Intel Monitor
recipes.description: Scrapes competitor sites weekly and emails a summary of changes.

recipes.title: Newsletter Generator
recipes.description: Scrapes your blog and industry news, composes a weekly newsletter with human review.

recipes.title: SEO Audit
recipes.description: Scrapes a page and produces an SEO audit with scores, issues, and fixes.

recipes.title: Content Calendar Generator
recipes.description: Generates a month of content ideas from themes and goals.

recipes.title: Social Media Post Generator
recipes.description: Creates platform-specific social posts from a topic and key points.

recipes.title: Sales Call Summarizer
recipes.description: Summarizes sales call transcripts and extracts deal signals.

recipes.title: Price Monitor
recipes.description: Monitors competitor pricing pages and alerts on changes.

categories.title: Customer Support
categories.description: Recipes for ticket routing, satisfaction scoring, feedback processing, and automated responses.

recipes.title: Support Ticket Router
recipes.description: Routes tickets by urgency and department, sends Slack alerts for critical ones.

recipes.title: Bug Report Triage
recipes.description: Classifies bug severity, assigns priority, notifies the right Slack channel, and emails the reporter.

recipes.title: Contact Form Autoresponder
recipes.description: Classifies contact form inquiries and sends a tailored autoresponse.

recipes.title: CSAT Scorer
recipes.description: Scores customer satisfaction from support interactions and triggers follow-ups for unhappy customers.

recipes.title: Feedback Survey Processor
recipes.description: Processes NPS surveys, routes detractors for follow-up, and persists all scores.

recipes.title: Review Sentiment Analysis
recipes.description: Analyzes product review sentiment and persists results for dashboards.

categories.title: Content & Media
categories.description: Recipes for content creation, translation, moderation, and distribution.

recipes.title: Blog Post Moderation
recipes.description: AI checks blog submissions for policy violations, then routes to human review or auto-publish.

recipes.title: Meeting Notes Summarizer
recipes.description: Turns raw meeting notes into structured summaries with action items.

recipes.title: Content Translator
recipes.description: Translates content into multiple languages with tone preservation.

recipes.title: KB Article Generator
recipes.description: Generates knowledge base articles from support ticket patterns, scrapes existing docs to find gaps.

recipes.title: Recipe Generator
recipes.description: Generates recipes from available ingredients and dietary preferences.

recipes.title: Changelog Announcer
recipes.description: Takes a changelog entry and generates announcements for email, Slack, and social.

recipes.title: Daily News Digest
recipes.description: Fetches top Hacker News stories daily, summarizes with AI, and emails a digest.

recipes.title: AI Embeddings
recipes.description: Generates text embeddings for semantic search.

recipes.title: Image Generation
recipes.description: Generates product images from text descriptions with prompt refinement.

categories.title: HR & Operations
categories.description: Recipes for hiring, onboarding, expense management, and event coordination.

recipes.title: Job Application Screener
recipes.description: AI evaluates job applications for fit, routes top candidates to human review, and sends rejections.

recipes.title: Expense Report Processor
recipes.description: Validates expense amounts against policy, routes high-value expenses for manager approval.

recipes.title: Onboarding Email Sequence
recipes.description: Sends personalized onboarding emails tailored to plan and use case.

recipes.title: Employee Feedback Analyzer
recipes.description: Analyzes anonymous employee feedback for themes and action items, persists for trend tracking.

recipes.title: Event Registration
recipes.description: Handles registrations with confirmation emails and waitlist overflow.

categories.title: Finance & Legal
categories.description: Recipes for document review, invoice processing, and approval workflows.

recipes.title: Contract Reviewer
recipes.description: Reviews contracts for risks and key terms, flags critical clauses for human legal review.

recipes.title: Invoice Processor
recipes.description: Extracts line items and totals from invoices, flags anomalies, and stores results.

recipes.title: Document Approval Workflow
recipes.description: Multi-stage document approval with human review gates and revision requests.

categories.title: DevOps
categories.description: Recipes for monitoring, alerting, webhooks, and infrastructure integration patterns.

recipes.title: Website Uptime Monitor
recipes.description: Pings a URL every 15 minutes, emails an alert when it goes down.

recipes.title: Inventory Alert
recipes.description: Checks inventory levels via API, emails when stock hits reorder point.

recipes.title: PR Review Notifier
recipes.description: Receives GitHub PR webhooks, summarizes changes with AI, and posts to Slack.

recipes.title: Webhook to Slack
recipes.description: Forwards any webhook event to Slack with formatted messages.

recipes.title: Data Quality Checker
recipes.description: Validates incoming data records against quality rules and quarantines bad data.

recipes.title: API Key Auth Example
recipes.description: Demonstrates auth blocks with API key authentication (OpenWeatherMap).

recipes.title: OAuth GitHub Integration
recipes.description: Demonstrates OAuth auth blocks with GitHub client credentials.

recipes.title: Postgres CRM Pipeline
recipes.description: Reads leads from Postgres, scores with AI, writes results back.

recipes.title: Bucket File Processor
recipes.description: Downloads a file from a bucket, processes it, and uploads the result.

categories.title: Patterns
categories.description: Language feature demonstrations you can mix into your own workflows.

recipes.title: Parallel Branches
recipes.description: Fan-out: root splits into multiple independent nodes that run concurrently.

recipes.title: Multi-Trigger Workflow
recipes.description: One graph, three trigger sources (form, webhook, schedule).

recipes.title: Subgraph Data Enrichment
recipes.description: Calling one graph from another as a subgraph node.

recipes.title: Wait Node Delayed Follow-up
recipes.description: Sends email immediately, then waits 3 days before a follow-up.

recipes.title: Stream Reporting Dashboard
recipes.description: One graph logs events with persistence, another queries the stream and emails a report.

recipes.title: External TS File Pattern
recipes.description: Complex data transformations entirely in inline @ts blocks.

node_types.description: Run TypeScript logic in a sandboxed @ts block
Call an LLM (text, object, embed, or image)
Make HTTP requests to external APIs
Scrape and extract web page content
Route execution down different paths based on conditions
Read from or write to a PostgreSQL database
Download or upload files to cloud storage
Call another graph as a subgraph
Pause execution for a duration before continuing
